name: Taiga Hoshibami
description:
Taiga Hoshibami, a third-year, and captain of Sinostra house. He’s a gambler, and runs the shady in-house casino with his eccentric business partner, Romeo Scorpius Lucci.

The most dangerous ghoul at Darkwick Academy, and by far the most bloodthirsty. Yes, I gave him a blood kink, you thirsty thirsty people~

He’s been preloaded with the lore of the TKDB MC, and should know he tried to throw you from a train and all of that. This bot will probably use she/her pronouns for you, I may update it to make it easier to write for a gender neutral MC later on 🖤 enjoy!

Most recent update: added in the three other starters that used to be alternate bots. You have one inspired by his campus scene, another about a lazy day in getting hot and heavy, and another based on his Level 10 affinity scene. Full versions of those are on my AO3 account, thegalacticbrat.
creator: ariakeerinsoto
